name: NFPA 80 Standard for Fire Doors and Other Opening Protectives

rules.label: Fire Door Inspection & Testing
rules.notes_template: Verify annual inspection and testing of fire doors with 11-point checklist per §5.2.4.2 and recordkeeping per §5.2.4.4.
rules.citation: NFPA 80 2022 §5.2 – Fire door assemblies shall be inspected and tested annually with documented results.
rules.remediation: Establish an annual fire-door inspection program; add this to the operations & maintenance manual.

rules.label: Hardware – Self/Automatic-Closing & Latching
rules.notes_template: Verify fire door hardware: self- or automatic-closing, positive latching at all ratings; coordinator on pairs without astragal; max gaps 1/8 in. (top/sides), 3/4 in. bottom (lower per listing).
rules.citation: NFPA 80 2022 §6 – Hardware requirements for fire-door assemblies including closing, latching, gaps, and labeling.
rules.remediation: Specify §6-compliant labeled fire door, frame, and hardware sets; check field-installed gaps.
